case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. ELIZABETH HURLEY

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-16-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
